feedItems.description: allocated £147.4m to Children's Social Care (≈£274 per resident)
allocated £66.2m to Environment & Streets (≈£123 per resident)
allocated £206.4m to Adult Social Care (≈£384 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £120 (4.9%) to £2551
